verse_text: So they went and made the tomb secure, sealing the stone and setting the guard.

links.context: Every man was to remain in his house on the Sabbath. Yet the Jewish leaders left their houses, contrary to the Law of Moses, to plot against Jesus ([[MAT.27:62]]-66; JohnChr). They broke the Law to plot against the Lawgiver.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The penalty for breaking the Sabbath was death. Yet the Jewish leaders did not rest on the Sabbath ([[MAT.27:62]]-66), but were running around and seeking to keep Christ in the tomb (AthanG).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
